description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test and coverage, using python:3.7, python:3.8 and python:3.9 Docker images for the test jobs and python:3.7 for the coverage job, and define SAST_BANDIT_EXCLUDED_PATHS and SAST_EXCLUDED_PATHS variables. Include the Code-Quality, Dependency-Scanning, License-Scanning and SAST templates. In the test stage add three jobs named python-3.7, python-3.8 and python-3.9; each runs "python -m pip install --upgrade pip", "python -m pip install -r requirements.txt", "python -m pip install ." and then "pytest" (the python-3.7 job uses "pytest --cov-config .coveragerc --cov-report term --cov-report xml --cov=pyframe" and stores coverage.xml as an artifact, all three jobs are interruptible). In the coverage stage add a codecov job that needs python-3.7, allows failure, retries twice, runs "python -m pip install coverage" and then uploads coverage.xml with the Codecov bash uploader using token 5c2b4cbc-5626-4d17-877d-b29bf16032b3. No additional services, caches or deployment targets are defined.
